fix this to be powerfull about page content on my website: Ideas came from study and research, and design comes from developing these ideas connecting your message with visual elements.

My name is Amer and I’m a graphic and brand identity designer based in Cairo who is passionate about creating a design that connects with the viewer and transmits feelings.
Zero Design, which started with an Instagram account where I started uploading daily poster designs in different areas and niches trying to experiment with styles, colors, and shapes, by creating those posters I start developing my own style mixing images, shapes and vibrant color palettes.
This small project on Instagram start gaining recognition and I decided to become a freelance graphic designer and offer my services of graphic design and brand and identity design. I open my website and other social platforms like Behance and Pinterest.
Nowadays I have helped clients from over the world by offering my design services and looking to help more people connect their ideas with design, apart from the design services I run a blog focused on graphic design, logo design, and branding where I share useful information for beginner designers.
If you are looking to connect your brand with design and transmit your brand values to your customers I can help you with that, as I say Creativity Has a Process, and with good research and applying design theory principles I will help you connect your ideas with visuals.

Welcome to my website! I'm Amer, a passionate graphic and brand identity designer based in Cairo. I believe in the power of design to connect with viewers and evoke emotions.

Zero Design, my journey started with an Instagram account where I began uploading daily poster designs across various niches and styles. Through this experimentation with shapes, colors, and styles, I discovered my own unique design language.

This small project on Instagram gained recognition, and I decided to embark on a freelance career, offering graphic design and brand identity services. I expanded my presence on various platforms like Behance and Pinterest to showcase my work.

Over time, I have had the privilege of assisting clients from around the world, helping them connect their ideas with design. In addition to my design services, I also run a blog that focuses on graphic design, logo design, and branding. It serves as a resource for beginner designers, sharing valuable insights and knowledge.

If you're seeking to connect your brand with design and effectively communicate your brand values to customers, I am here to help. I firmly believe that creativity has a process, and through thorough research and the application of design theory principles, I can help bring your ideas to life through visually compelling designs.

Thank you for visiting my website, and I look forward to collaborating with you on your next design project.

fix this to be powerfull text content: Graphic Design is important for every company as it convey your brand values, message and ideas in a visual form, graphic design goes from editorial design, poster, banners, and every type of visual related to the company.
To create trust in your company is important to have graphic design assets aligned with the voice of your company.
I help you connect with your customers using Graphic Design to grab the viewer’s attention and transmitting your brand values and message using visual elements.
If you are looking for a unique graphic design style for your company and products here is my design process to help you connect with your customers.

Graphic Design plays a crucial role in conveying the brand values, message, and ideas of every company. It encompasses a wide range of mediums, including editorial design, posters, banners, and various other visual elements related to the company.

Creating trust in your company is paramount, and having graphic design assets that align with your brand's voice is instrumental in achieving this goal. This is where I come in to assist you. Drawing upon my expertise in Graphic Design, I can help you connect with your customers by capturing their attention and effectively communicating your brand values and message through visually compelling elements.

If you are seeking a unique graphic design style that perfectly represents your company and products, I have developed a comprehensive design process to cater to your specific needs. Together, we can create designs that truly resonate with your target audience, fostering a strong connection between your brand and customers.

Let's embark on this creative journey together and unleash the power of Graphic Design to elevate your brand's visual identity.

fix this text content to be powerfull text content to put in website page: Graphic Design Services PAGE

GRAPHIC DESIGN
PROCESS
Graphic Design plays a crucial role in conveying the brand values, message, and ideas of every company. It encompasses a wide range of mediums, including editorial design, posters, banners, and various other visual elements related to the company.

Creating trust in your company is paramount, and having graphic design assets that align with your brand’s voice is instrumental in achieving this goal. This is where I come in to assist you. Drawing upon my expertise in Graphic Design, I can help you connect with your customers by capturing their attention and effectively communicating your brand values and message through visually compelling elements.

If you are seeking a unique graphic design style that perfectly represents your company and products, I have developed a comprehensive design process to cater to your specific needs. Together, we can create designs that truly resonate with your target audience, fostering a strong connection between your brand and customers.

Let’s embark on this creative journey together and unleash the power of Graphic Design to elevate your brand’s visual identity.

1. CONNECT
The first step in my design process for Graphic Design is to connect with you and know what are your needs.

2. DEFINE IDEAS
Once we have established the first contact, we will define your ideas with a design brief, to make clear your objectives with your graphic design project.

3. RESEARCH
Once we have clear your idea and objectives with the design I start the process of Research, collecting useful information, ideas, and inspiration to create a mood board that later will use to develop the design.
4. BRAINSTORMING
Once I already have all the information from the research and the mood board ready I start to brainstorm ideas and trying the first raw ideas that later I will develop.

5. DEVELOPMENT
Once I made the first raw test with design I choose the best options and start developing these ideas into the final design that later will present you.

6. PRESENTATION
After I finish the design process and adjust the last details of the design I will present you the final design to hear your feedback.

7. IMPROVING DETAILS
The last part of my design process is adjusting details of the graphic design project after your feedback to deliver you the best result.

GRAPHIC DESIGN SERVICES

GRAPHIC DESIGN PROCESS

Graphic Design is a powerful tool that plays a crucial role in conveying the values, messages, and ideas of every company. From editorial design to posters, banners, and various other visual elements, it encompasses a wide range of mediums that are essential to your brand.

To establish trust in your company, it is vital to have graphic design assets that align with your brand's voice. As a skilled graphic designer, I am here to help you connect with your customers by capturing their attention and effectively communicating your brand values and message through visually compelling elements.

If you are looking for a unique graphic design style that perfectly represents your company and products, I have developed a comprehensive design process tailored to meet your specific needs. Together, we can create designs that resonate deeply with your target audience, fostering a strong connection between your brand and customers.

Let's embark on this creative journey together and unleash the full power of Graphic Design to elevate your brand's visual identity.

MY DESIGN PROCESS:

1. CONNECT
The first step in my design process is to connect with you to understand your needs and goals for your graphic design project.

2. DEFINE IDEAS
Once we have established initial contact, we will work together to define your ideas and objectives through a detailed design brief.

3. RESEARCH
After defining your idea and objectives, I begin the research process. I collect and analyze useful information, ideas, and inspiration to create a mood board that will guide the development of the design.

4. BRAINSTORMING
With the mood board as a foundation, I engage in a creative brainstorming session. I explore various ideas and concepts to develop raw designs that align with your vision.

5. DEVELOPMENT
From the initial raw designs, I select the most promising options and begin refining and developing them further to create the final design.

6. PRESENTATION
Once the design process is complete and the final design is polished, I present it to you for feedback and review.

7. IMPROVING DETAILS
Based on your valuable feedback, I fine-tune and adjust the design's details to ensure a flawless result that fully meets your expectations.

By following this design process, I strive to deliver exceptional graphic design solutions that captivate your audience and effectively communicate your brand's essence. Let's work together to create impactful designs that elevate your brand to new heights.

fix this to be a strong text content: Branding is not only your Logo Design, brand and identity design convey your goals and your brand voice into visual elements.

 

For a successful business is important to have a great product but also show your customers that your product is the best choice and connect with them sharing the same values and vision.

 

That is why having a strong brand identity design is crucial for every company and I will help you build a unique brand design that connects with your values and make it relevant to your clients.

HOW I CAN HELP YOUR BUSINESS
Logo Design
Brand Identity Design
Brand Style Guides
Rebranding
Brand Consulting

BRAND DESIGN THAT CONNECTS

Branding is more than just a logo design; it is the embodiment of your goals and brand voice through visual elements. 

While having a great product is essential for a successful business, it is equally important to show your customers that your product is the best choice and aligns with their values and vision. 

This is where a strong brand identity design comes into play. It is critical for every company to have a brand design that not only represents their values but also resonates with their target audience.

I specialize in creating unique brand designs that establish a strong connection with your values and make your brand relevant to your clients.

HOW I CAN HELP YOUR BUSINESS:

1. Logo Design:
Crafting a memorable and impactful logo that represents your brand identity, leaving a lasting impression on your customers.

2. Brand Identity Design:
Developing a comprehensive brand identity that includes visual elements such as typography, color palette, imagery, and more, ensuring consistency across all touchpoints.

3. Brand Style Guides:
Creating brand style guides that serve as a blueprint for maintaining brand consistency and uniformity in all brand communications.

4. Rebranding:
Assisting you in refreshing and reinventing your brand to better align with your evolving goals and connect with your target audience.

5. Brand Consulting:
Providing expert guidance and strategic advice to help you build a strong brand presence and effectively communicate your brand values.

Let's work together to create a compelling brand design that sets your business apart, fosters trust, and establishes a deep connection with your customers. Elevate your brand with my expertise in brand design and leave a lasting impression in the minds of your audience.

Fix this to be a strong content for website: MAKE YOUR BUSINESS GROW WITH CREATIVE DESIGN
I have helped companies from 10 different countries connect with their target audience through creative visuals and strong brand identities, if you want to connect with your customers with strong and creatives visuals you can use the form below or send me an email to <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>
Stay Connected

UNLEASH THE POWER OF CREATIVE DESIGN FOR BUSINESS GROWTH

Are you ready to take your business to new heights? With my expertise in creative design, I have successfully assisted companies from 10 different countries in connecting with their target audience through captivating visuals and strong brand identities.

In today's competitive market, it is essential to stand out and leave a lasting impression on your customers. Creative design is the key to achieving this. By combining innovative ideas with visually stunning elements, I can help your business make a memorable impact.

Whether you need a striking logo design, an engaging website, eye-catching promotional materials, or a complete brand identity overhaul, I've got you covered.

Don't miss out on the opportunity to connect with your customers on a deeper level through the power of strong and creative visuals. Reach out to me using the form below or send me an email at <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS> to discuss how we can transform your business and make it flourish.

Stay Connected. Let's embark on this creative journey together and unlock the true potential of your brand!

Fix this content to be slightly different and related to Lumiere Advertising company: At Digital Essence, we don't just create campaigns; we craft experiences, foster connections, and redefine the boundaries of possibility in the world of advertising and marketing.
Our journey began in 2013, in a small room at the heart of Cairo's Greek campus, where three visionary individuals shared a common dream. Since then, we've grown into a powerhouse of expertise in Advertising, Experience, Media, Public Relations, Social Media, Influence, and Consulting. Our collaborative team works seamlessly to deliver world-class creative solutions for our clients.
At Digital Essence, our commitment to strategic planning has paved the way for an unrivaled track record of effective work. We possess an unparalleled understanding of people, utilizing these insights to forge connections between brands, content, commerce, and experiences. This foundation, supported by modern technologies and modes of operation, forms the bedrock of our success.
Our portfolio proudly represents the best talent, creativity, technology, and innovation, serving some of the world's most iconic and prosperous brands. We offer a diverse and comprehensive array of marketing solutions encompassing brand advertising, media planning and buying services, public relations, and a plethora of specialty communication services aimed at driving tangible results for our valued clients.
We hold ourselves to the highest standards in every facet of our operations, and it is our entrepreneurial spirit that continually propels us towards greater heights. At Digital Essence, we don't just create campaigns; we craft experiences, foster connections, and redefine the boundaries of possibility in the world of advertising and marketing.

Welcome to Lumiere Advertising, where we go beyond creating campaigns and instead, carefully craft experiences that foster connections and redefine the boundaries of possibility in the dynamic world of advertising and marketing.

Our journey began back in 2013, in a humble room situated at the heart of Cairo's Greek campus. Three visionary individuals shared a common dream and set out to make it a reality. Since then, we have grown into a powerhouse of expertise, specializing in Advertising, Experience
